block_01: Just by itself, Stochastic is a simple tool to give you signals from other indicators. However, once two Stochastics with different settings meet, they can offer you some serious analytic capabilities.
block_02: In this piece you will learn how to use a trading strategy based on two Stochastic indicators.
block_04: Straddle Strategy — When Trend Direction Doesn’t Matter
block_05: Most of the trading strategies rely on you predicting the trend of the market. Straddle strategy instead mostly relies on the volatility of the trend, even if price still plays a role. Learn more about it and trade on markets with uncertain trends.
block_07: Trailing Stop Loss — Close Deals Automatically
block_08: Some quality of life features are often overlooked in trading. The one we will be talking about — Trailing Stop Loss — is one of them. Read it to learn how to better automate and to increase consistency of your trading.
